item.title: Kouri Richin’s Finds Out She Was Written Out of her Husband’s Will
item.description:
In 2022, Utah woman Kouri Richins became the focus of an investigation after her husband, Eric Richins, died unexpectedly at their home. Authorities later alleged she discovered he had removed her from his will shortly before his death.
Investigators claimed financial motives played a key role in the case, pointing to insurance policies, property disputes, and changes to estate documents. Prosecutors later charged Kouri Richins with aggravated murder and related offenses.
The case drew national attention after it was revealed she had published a children’s grief book following her husband’s death. Richins has denied the allegations, and the case remains ongoing.

media:content.media:title: Kouri Richin’s Finds Out She Was Written Out of her Husband’s Will
media:content.media:description:
In 2022, Utah woman Kouri Richins became the focus of an investigation after her husband, Eric Richins, died unexpectedly at their home. Authorities later alleged she discovered he had removed her from his will shortly before his death.
Investigators claimed financial motives played a key role in the case, pointing to insurance policies, property disputes, and changes to estate documents. Prosecutors later charged Kouri Richins with aggravated murder and related offenses.
The case drew national attention after it was revealed she had published a children’s grief book following her husband’s death. Richins has denied the allegations, and the case remains ongoing.

item.title: The Stockdale Family Story: What Led To This?
item.description: In 2017, Jacob Stockdale killed his mother, Kathryn, and younger brother, James, at their Ohio home before attempting to take his own life. The family had previously appeared on the reality show Wife Swap, where their strict lifestyle drew public attention.

media:content.media:title: The Stockdale Family Story: What Led To This?
media:content.media:description: In 2017, Jacob Stockdale killed his mother, Kathryn, and younger brother, James, at their Ohio home before attempting to take his own life. The family had previously appeared on the reality show Wife Swap, where their strict lifestyle drew public attention.

item.title: The Stockdale Family Story: What Led To This?
item.description: In 2017, Jacob Stockdale killed his mother, Kathryn, and younger brother, James, at their Ohio home before attempting to take his own life. The family had previously appeared on the reality show Wife Swap, where their strict lifestyle drew public attention.

media:content.media:title: The Stockdale Family Story: What Led To This?
media:content.media:description: In 2017, Jacob Stockdale killed his mother, Kathryn, and younger brother, James, at their Ohio home before attempting to take his own life. The family had previously appeared on the reality show Wife Swap, where their strict lifestyle drew public attention.

item.title: What Happened To Alissa Turney? Sarah Speaks Out!
item.description:
In May 2001, 17 year old Alissa Turney disappeared from Phoenix, Arizona after leaving school early. Her stepfather, Michael Turney, claimed she ran away, but no confirmed trace of her has ever been found.
Years later, her sister Sarah Turney began publicly advocating for the case, using social media and podcasts to push for renewed attention. Investigators later charged Michael Turney with murder, though the charge was dismissed in 2023 due to insufficient evidence.
Despite the dismissal, Alissa remains missing and the investigation is still open. The case continues to draw attention as her family searches for answers about what happened.

media:content.media:title: What Happened To Alissa Turney? Sarah Speaks Out!
media:content.media:description:
In May 2001, 17 year old Alissa Turney disappeared from Phoenix, Arizona after leaving school early. Her stepfather, Michael Turney, claimed she ran away, but no confirmed trace of her has ever been found.
Years later, her sister Sarah Turney began publicly advocating for the case, using social media and podcasts to push for renewed attention. Investigators later charged Michael Turney with murder, though the charge was dismissed in 2023 due to insufficient evidence.
Despite the dismissal, Alissa remains missing and the investigation is still open. The case continues to draw attention as her family searches for answers about what happened.
